name: DoIP_GetAliveCheckTimeout, DoIP_SetAliveCheckTimeout
title: DoIP_GetAliveCheckTimeout, DoIP_SetAliveCheckTimeout
description: Sets or returns Alive Check Timeout (T_TCP_Alive_Check)) in milliseconds.
This function must be called in on preStart.
return: Form 1: —Form 2: The timeout parameter in milliseconds

description: This value can also be configured in the DoIP.INI file.
